text: I spend 3 hours every week manually copying client feedback from Slack, email, and Figma comments into a single spreadsheet. There has to be a better way to consolidate design feedback.
notes: Clear pain, specific user, monetizable, moderate competition

text: The weather is nice today. I went for a walk and saw a dog.
notes: Pure noise — no pain point, no product need

text: Why doesn't anyone build a simple tool to track my brain fog episodes and correlate them with sleep, diet, and medication? I'd pay $20/month for this.
notes: Explicit willingness to pay, niche health tracking

text: I hate how Google keeps changing their search results. Everything is AI slop now.
notes: General complaint, no actionable product need

text: As a DevOps engineer, I need to monitor 15 different SaaS tools for outages. Each has its own status page with different formats. I check them manually every morning.
notes: Clear pain, specific audience (DevOps), existing competitors but gap exists
